details.test: Task 1: Enroll in cheapest April Puppy Basics 4-week class under 180
Task 2: Book weekend morning in-home private session under 120
Task 3: Choose puppy package with more sessions under 300 and add to cart
Task 4: Add group class and private session to same cart
Task 5: Enroll in highest-rated behavior class under 250 with >=4 sessions
Task 6: Subscribe to weekly newsletter with puppy training & behavior topics
Task 7: Save two crate training articles to saved resources
Task 8: Submit contact request about dog aggression with evening callback
Task 9: Purchase 150 digital gift card with custom message
